tools.name: get_todays_all_ten_puzzle
tools.description: Play Beast Academy's All Ten daily math puzzle. An engaging, educational number game for elementary students (ages 6-13) that builds arithmetic skills and creative problem-solving. Use four numbers with operations (+, -, ×, ÷) to make all numbers 1-10. Perfect for kids who enjoy math challenges, parents seeking educational games, homeschool enrichment, or gifted learner activities. It's a great example of the type of thinking Beast Academy's curriculum will enable.

tools.name: validate_equation
tools.description: Check if an All Ten equation is mathematically correct and follows game rules. Validates that the expression uses all four given numbers exactly once with allowed operations (+, -, ×, ÷) and evaluates to a whole number between 1 and 10.
